# Sessile Fauna  

## Ascidia  
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 4:5){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Bryozoa
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 14:26){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Cnidaria
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in c(1:3,55:60,73:84,112)){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Macroalgae
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 65:66){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Porifera
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 89:111){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Unidentified classifications
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 113:125){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```
